takes.imagePrompt: Ultra photorealistic 8K cinematic footage. Brazilian man, approximately 62 years old, salt-and-pepper hair, deep facial wrinkles, sun-aged skin, salt-and-pepper stubble, tired heavy eyes. He stands shirtless in front of a bathroom mirror in a modest Brazilian residential bathroom — simple ceramic tiles in beige and cream, fluorescent light overhead, small worn towel hanging on a hook. He grips both sides of the porcelain sink, head slightly lowered, looking at his own reflection with quiet defeat. Visible pajama pants. Through a small frosted window, weak early morning light filters in. Photorealistic skin texture with pores, sun spots, sagging skin, body hair. Documentary aesthetic, not staged. Brazilian home interior with real lived-in details — toothbrush in cup, soap bar on sink edge. Shot on Sony A7IV, 35mm lens, shallow depth of field, natural color grading, no AI artifacts, no text, no watermark.
takes.videoPrompt: Static handheld shot with subtle organic camera tremor. The man slowly exhales — chest rising and falling once. His eyes shift up to meet his own reflection in the mirror. A long, weighted blink. Subtle head tilt downward at the end. Continuous fluid movement, no morphing, no distortion. Maintain facial consistency. Smooth natural motion, cinematic camera movement, realistic physics, photorealistic motion.

takes.imagePrompt: Cinematic intimate close-up. Interior of a porcelain Brazilian toilet bowl, slightly tilted top-down angle. The still surface of the bowl water reflects the bathroom ceiling light. A single small droplet of pale yellow urine suspended in mid-fall, just about to break the water surface — captured in extreme slow motion. Above the bowl, completely out of focus, the silhouette of male pajama pants and waistline. Tiled walls of typical Brazilian residential bathroom in soft focus. Cold morning light coming from above. Ultra-realistic, clinical documentary aesthetic — observational, not vulgar. Photorealistic, no text, shot on Sony A7IV, macro lens detail.
takes.videoPrompt: Slow motion close-up. Three or four single droplets fall one by one into the toilet water — long pauses between drops, each one barely impacting the surface. Subtle concentric ripples expand outward from each impact. No other movement. The silhouette above remains still. Camera completely static. Smooth natural physics, no morphing, no distortion, photorealistic motion.

takes.imagePrompt: Cinematic wide shot. A Brazilian cemetery in late afternoon golden hour, long shadows stretching across the grass. In the foreground, a freshly placed gravestone — simple Portuguese inscription visible ('Pai Amado') but slightly soft-focused. In the background, an older Brazilian woman in black mourning clothes and two adult children (one man, one woman, 35-45 years old) stand silently, faces partially obscured or in soft profile, holding small white flowers. Cypress trees and Brazilian cemetery architecture — modest tombstones, paved paths, scattered candles on neighboring graves. Atmospheric melancholic mood, warm amber light on cool stone surfaces. Photorealistic, documentary cinematography. No text artificially added. Shot on Sony A7IV, 50mm lens, shallow depth of field.
takes.videoPrompt: Static wide shot, very subtle handheld tremor. A light wind moves the white flowers in the family members' hands and rustles the cypress leaves above. The adult son slowly lowers his head. The mother's shoulders sink almost imperceptibly. Long shadows shift minimally as a cloud passes. Camera holds. Continuous fluid movement, no morphing, photorealistic motion, cinematic atmosphere.

takes.imagePrompt: Wide cinematic shot of a Brazilian middle-class living room during a soccer match. Family of 5 people — wife in her 60s, adult son in his 30s, daughter, son-in-law, and a small grandchild — explode in celebration jumping up from a worn beige fabric sofa. They wear casual home clothes, with at least two people in yellow Brazil national team jerseys. A large flat-screen TV in the background shows blurred green soccer field action with player figures (no logos, no readable text). On the wooden coffee table: open beer bottles, a plate of pão de queijo, a half-eaten bowl of amendoim. In the immediate foreground — sharp focus — sits an empty armchair with a man's recently abandoned half-full coffee mug and a TV remote control on the armrest. Warm tungsten ceiling lamp light. Real Brazilian home — family photos on the wall, painted wood paneling, ceiling fan. Photorealistic, lived-in, documentary feel. Shot on Sony A7IV, 35mm lens, no text, no watermark.
takes.videoPrompt: Family explodes in celebration of a goal — wife throws hands up, son jumps, son-in-law fists pumping, grandchild laughs and claps. The TV flickers with replay action behind them. The empty armchair in foreground remains perfectly still — the coffee mug, the abandoned remote. Camera holds static composition, very subtle handheld tremor. Continuous natural motion, realistic body physics, no morphing, no distortion.

takes.imagePrompt: Medium-wide shot from doorway angle into a Brazilian residential bathroom. The bathroom door is half-closed — through the gap we glimpse warm yellow living room light spilling in from outside. Inside, a 60-year-old Brazilian man stands at the porcelain toilet, his back fully to camera, head slightly bowed forward. He wears a yellow Brazil national team jersey and pajama bottoms. The bathroom has cold blue overhead fluorescent light contrasting harshly with the warm light leaking through the door gap. Simple Brazilian bathroom — ceramic tiles, towel hook, small window with sheer curtain. Real lived-in environment. Photorealistic 8K, shot on Sony A7IV, no text.
takes.videoPrompt: The man stands motionless, back to camera. His shoulders visibly drop. Distant muffled cheering from the living room can be felt through the door gap (visually implied — door gap glow flickering slightly with movement outside). He doesn't move otherwise. Camera holds completely static, no movement. Continuous photorealistic motion, no morphing.

takes.imagePrompt: Tight medium close-up of a 60-year-old Brazilian man's face from a side three-quarter angle. He looks down toward the toilet, jaw clenched tight, eyes glistening with the beginning of tears that don't quite fall, betrayed by his own body. Cold blue bathroom light reflects on one side of his face, warm yellow light from the living room door reflects on the other side — split lighting. Deep facial wrinkles, sweat beading at his hairline, salt-and-pepper stubble catching the light. Out of focus behind him: the bathroom door slightly ajar, warm glow leaking in. Photorealistic skin with pores and detail, documentary intimacy. Shot on Sony A7IV, 85mm lens, very shallow depth of field. No text, no watermark.
takes.videoPrompt: Slow continuous push-in on the man's face. His eyes shift briefly toward camera, then drop heavily back to the floor. He swallows hard — Adam's apple visibly moving. One slow controlled blink. A single tear forms in the corner of his eye but does not fall. His jaw clenches tighter. Camera continues pushing in slowly throughout the full duration. Minimal head movement, maintain facial consistency, continuous fluid motion, no morphing, photorealistic emotion.

takes.imagePrompt: Triple horizontal split-screen composition — three panels stacked, equal proportions. Top panel: overhead shot of an untouched bowl of green Brazilian salad (alface, tomate, cenoura ralada) on a simple ceramic plate, sitting on a kitchen counter, fork beside it, late afternoon window light. Middle panel: medium shot of a 60-year-old Brazilian man on a treadmill in a basic neighborhood gym (academia de bairro) — simple mirrored walls, other equipment in background, he sweats heavily, expression resigned and exhausted. Bottom panel: close-up of a male weathered hand on a bedside table holding a generic blister pack of small white pills (no visible brand, no logo, no readable text on the blister), next to a glass of water and a worn alarm clock. All three panels share consistent slightly desaturated cinematic color grading — melancholic, defeated. Real Brazilian environments in each. Photorealistic 8K, shot on Sony A7IV, no text, no watermark.
takes.videoPrompt: Three panels animate simultaneously with independent subtle motion. Top panel: the salad fork twirls once slowly as if someone half-heartedly stirred and gave up. Middle panel: the man walks slowly on the treadmill, breathing heavy, towel on shoulder swaying. Bottom panel: the male hand presses one pill out of the blister with thumb, pill drops onto the table surface. All three movements happen in parallel, no panel transitions. Continuous smooth realistic motion, no morphing, photorealistic.

takes.imagePrompt: Cinematic 3D medical animation — documentary anatomy style, NOT cartoon, NOT sci-fi. Same prostate gland from previous frame, same teal-blue clinical background and volumetric lighting. Now: a dark viscous substance — toxic muddy sludge with metallic dark-brown and oily black coloration — accumulates aggressively on and around the prostate. takes.imagePrompt: Cinematic close-up on a rustic Brazilian wooden cutting board. Several fresh turmeric roots (açafrão da terra / cúrcuma) — earthy brown skin, some still with bits of soil — are arranged on the board. One root is cut clean open, revealing a vivid intense orange-gold interior with natural fibrous texture. Beside the roots: a small handmade clay bowl filled with bright golden turmeric powder, a vintage brass mortar and pestle, a sprig of fresh rosemary. Soft warm morning window light streams in from the left at a low angle. Out-of-focus Brazilian kitchen background — colorful azulejo tiles in blue and white, hanging copper pans, a clay water filter (filtro de barro), wooden shelves with glass jars of spices. Visible subtle steam rising from a small ceramic mug nearby. Healthy, hopeful, ancestral atmosphere. Photorealistic 8K, shot on Sony A7IV, 50mm macro lens, shallow depth of field, golden warm color grading. No text, no watermark.
takes.videoPrompt: A pinch of vibrant golden turmeric powder falls in beautiful slow motion from an unseen hand above onto the freshly cut root — golden particles drift and catch the warm window light, dispersing like glowing dust. The steam from the ceramic mug curls gently upward in lazy spirals. The rosemary sprig sways minimally from the air movement. Camera slowly pushes in toward the cut root over the full duration, ending tight on the brilliant gold interior. Continuous fluid natural motion, realistic physics for falling powder and steam, no morphing, photorealistic golden hour lighting.
